description_long: This is a commercial-style refrigerated display cabinet, commonly found in urban convenience stores or cafes. The front features two large glass doors, behind which are four shelves stocked with rows of canned beverages, including Sprite and Coca-Cola. The exterior is finished in a sleek, dark metallic color, giving it a modern and professional appearance. The sides and top are solid and opaque, while the front is transparent to showcase the contents. The cabinet is tall and rectangular, with a robust build suitable for high-traffic urban environments. The interior is illuminated, enhancing the visibility of the products inside.
description: A tall, dark metallic refrigerated display cabinet with glass doors, showcasing rows of Sprite and Coca-Cola cans on multiple shelves.
description_view_0: Side view showing the solid, dark metallic panel with a slight reflection and the edge of the glass door.
description_view_1: Front view displaying two glass doors, four shelves, and rows of Sprite and Coca-Cola cans inside.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the solid side panel and the edge of the door.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a solid, featureless dark metallic back panel.
